title: Reversible Rods
description: now you can turn blaze powder into blaze rods and wind charges into breezerods
body: This datapack adds new crafting recipes that let you turn blaze powder back into blaze rods and wind charges into breezerods. It makes these rare items renewable and easier to obtain by adding balanced reverse-crafting recipes. Perfect for survival worlds or players who want more flexible resource progression without farming Blazes or Breezes.
